pages.text: The $(item)Drive Crafting Table$() is a dedicated crafting station for drive-based recipes.$(br2)Place a filled $(thing)Drive$() in the drive slot and arrange the recipe ingredients in the 3×3 grid. If the drive contains the required recipe ID and the ingredients match, the result appears in the output slot.

pages.title: Shaped & Shapeless
pages.text: Drive crafting recipes can be either $(thing)shaped$() (position matters in the grid) or $(thing)shapeless$() (order doesn't matter).$(br2)The drive is $(thing)not consumed$() — it stays in the drive slot after crafting, allowing you to craft the same recipe repeatedly.
